text.title: Multi-Burn-Rate SLO Recipe Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether multi-burn-rate-slo-recipe applies. Root question is a yes/no observable on the incoming task; branches name a concrete observable (`when`) and conclude either with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the service have a published SLO with an error budget window AND an alerting platform that supports multi-window expressions?

branch.conclusion: Apply the recipe: 2 windows × 2 burn rates.
Migrate to multi-window; reduce false-positive volume.

example.description: When `yes AND no_existing_burn_alerts` holds, the tree concludes `rule:r1` — meaning the methodology applies via that specific rule. The agent should load the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follow it.
